title: Cross-asset diversified TSMOM overlay (activate/extend trend-tilt sleeve)
source: Alpha-avenue review 2026-05-29 (quant-phd-advisor, literature-grounded). Directional prediction exhausted (9 nulls); non-directional risk premia untested. See agent review for citations.
why: Most robust documented premium for this universe (MOP 2012; AQR) but 1-12 month horizon, decayed to ~0.5-0.7 OOS. We already have a trend-tilt sleeve built (currently OFF). Fallback premium if crypto perps are unavailable. NOT a 5-day sprint signal.
scope: Extend the existing trend_tilt_sleeve into a diversified cross-asset TSMOM overlay (1/3/12-mo trend, all 8 assets).
Audit OOS Sharpe + crisis-hedge skew; keep isolated/capped (lottery-sleeve envelope).
Deploy only as a small diversified TILT on top of the survival book, never single-asset; OFF for the 5-day sprint (deployed==audited).

history.reason: backlog: log non-directional alpha avenues (B0100-B0102) from PhD review

Pre-flight PASSED (scripts/preflight_tsmom_overlay.py, real SSOT book, daily, n=1565d). Standalone TSMOM is WEAK + crash-prone (Sharpe ~0.3 best at 126d lookback, gross maxDD -65%), BUT near-zero/negative correlation to the long-only book (corr ~ -0.14) makes it DIVERSIFYING: combined book+overlay Sharpe 0.510 -> 0.632 (+24%) at 126d, f=0.5. Robust portfolio-theory result (uncorrelated positive-Sharpe sleeve lifts the combined), not overfit. CAVEATS: (1) 1-12mo horizon -> NOT harvestable in the 5-day sprint (product-only). (2) size conservatively: f~0.2-0.3 (Sharpe ~0.56-0.61) with the EXISTING trend_tilt_sleeve envelope+latch cap, NOT f=0.5 into a crash-prone sleeve. RECOMMEND: promote to a spec for the persistent product; extend trend_tilt_sleeve into a full diversified TSMOM overlay; keep OFF for the competition. Needs risk-officer review + a proper backtest with the sleeve latch before any arming.
Pre-flight passed (diversifying, +24% combined Sharpe) but product-only (1-12mo horizon, not the sprint) and needs conservative sizing -> solid M, not H.
research(alpha): TSMOM overlay pre-flight â€” PASSES as a diversifier (product, not sprint)

Spec written (promotion proposed->spec). Diversified TSMOM overlay generalizing the existing trend_tilt_sleeve (top_n=None), conservative sizing f=0.2-0.3, isolated envelope+latch, parity-safe SSOT, gated on risk-officer + latch-aware audit; OFF for the sprint.

to.label: DSR re-test of the best-of-grid combined Sharpe (B0116 follow-up)

history.reason: DSR RE-TEST (scripts/tsmom_overlay_dsr.py, 2026-05-31), prompted by the B0116 finding that single-path TSMOM results mislead (tsmom_252 looked best historically, worst in distribution). The block bootstrap is the WRONG tool here (mean block ~70d < the 126-252d momentum horizon -> would destroy the signal's edge by construction), so the right correction for the pre-flight's real weakness -- the +24% was the BEST of a 4x4 (lookback x f) grid on ONE path -- is the Deflated Sharpe Ratio. RESULT: the +24% reproduces (crypto-era book 0.522 -> best combo 0.634 at L=126/f=0.5, +21%; this is the window the original pre-flight used), BUT it does NOT survive multiple-testing deflation: DSR(best | 17 trials) = 0.923 crypto-era / 0.830 full-history, BOTH < 0.95. The uplift is statistically indistinguishable from luck-of-17-tries. The diversification IS real (corr_book -0.13..-0.16 at short lookbacks) and every cell's uplift is positive, but the best combo always wins at f=0.5 (monotone in f) -> in-sample over-loading. CAVEAT: DSR 0.923 is close to 0.95 and the 17 trials are highly correlated (4 fractions of one lookback ~ identical) so effective N << 17 makes DSR conservative -> crypto-era verdict is genuinely AMBIGUOUS, not a clean reject. NET: B0102 is the strongest of the three non-directional candidates (B0100 venue-blocked, B0101 null) but its Sharpe uplift is NOT confirmed; diversification is its one real property. Remains PRODUCT-ONLY (1-12mo horizon, OFF for the sprint). Before any product build: fix (L,f) a priori (no grid pick), compute combined maxDD (overlay standalone maxDD -65%..-75%), and get a quant-advisor review of the correlated-trials DSR nuance + an OOS-window robustness check.
research(alpha): B0102 DSR re-test â€” TSMOM uplift not significant after deflation

from.label: DSR re-test of the best-of-grid combined Sharpe (B0116 follow-up)

to.label: DSR re-test of the best-of-grid combined Sharpe (B0116 follow-up)
quant-advisor-prescribed closure stack (a-priori PSR + gates + convexity + OOS)

history.reason: CLOSURE (scripts/tsmom_overlay_closure.py, quant-phd-advisor-prescribed test stack, 2026-05-31). DECISIVE test = the A-PRIORI single spec (MOP L=252, f set by a pre-registered 20% variance risk-budget, NO grid pick): combined book is STATISTICALLY INDISTINGUISHABLE from book-alone -- PSR(combined>book) = 0.542 crypto-era / 0.539 full-history (bar 0.95). The +21% pre-flight uplift was ENTIRELY a best-of-16-grid artifact; once the spec is pre-registered the edge vanishes. Corroborated: (a) OOS 5-fold purged walk-forward on the fast lookback is a COIN-FLIP in the deployed crypto regime (2/5 folds positive); (b) the combined book's 95% CVaR WORSENS in both windows (deepens the left tail -- disqualifying for a capital-preservation product); (c) NO crisis convexity in the deployed regime (Treynor-Mazuy book^2 t=1.49 crypto-era; convexity only appears over the 28y FX-dominated history, t=3.03 -- a different regime); (d) on full history the a-priori combined BREACHES the -10% maxDD mandate. NOTE: the effective-N DSR (Test 1) came out degenerate (N_eff=1.10 because all 17 combined series are book-dominated -> raised DSR to 0.937 rather than lowering it as the advisor predicted); it is moot, the a-priori PSR sidesteps multiplicity entirely. NUANCE preserved: classic long-horizon TSMOM IS a real (decayed) premium with genuine convexity on broad/long history -- relevant ONLY to a future longer-horizon, more-asset product, NOT this 8-asset crypto-era preservation book. Completes the non-directional frontier sweep (B0100 venue-blocked, B0101 null, B0102 no-edge) -> reinforces survival-book-is-sprint-optimal. Code (trend_tilt_sleeve, preflight + dsr + closure scripts) retained for a future product re-test.
research(alpha): B0102 closure â€” TSMOM overlay discarded (no edge a-priori)
